description: Bond type declarations for wetSpring science facade — defines how this NUCLEUS participates in inter-spring and external collaboration.

Covalent.description: LAN mesh bonding — same family, same biomeOS instance, full trust

Ionic.description: Cross-family / external researcher bonding — metered, contract-scoped, provenance-wrapped
Ionic.gap: Ionic contract negotiation protocol not yet implemented — owned by primalSpring Track 4 (BondingConstraint + BondingPolicy)

GeneticLineage.description: Same family seed — implicit full trust within the biomeOS mesh

Contractual.description: Explicit contract with capability scoping and provenance audit trail
Contractual.verification: Dark Forest gate + per-request consent check
Contractual.gap: Contract negotiation and lifecycle management not yet implemented

gaps.description: No protocol for establishing, modifying, or terminating ionic bonds
NestGate stores locally but no protocol for provenance-wrapped data pull by remote springs
Provenance braids have no public chain anchor mechanism yet
